Maintainer.Profile: JSONbored publishes beginner-friendly All-in-One Unraid containers for powerful self-hosted apps that normally require multi-container setup, manual dependency wiring, or advanced compose translation. The goal is to make advanced software easier to discover, install, update, and support on real homelabs without hiding important power-user options.
Maintainer.DonateText: If these AIO templates save you time, please consider supporting ongoing maintenance through GitHub Sponsors or Ko-fi.
